command:
echo "=== ADD UFW RULE FOR PORT 8788 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
sudo ufw allow from 192.168.0.0/24 to any port 8788 comment "remy CF tunnel socat forwarder"
sudo ufw status | grep 8788
' 2>&1

echo "=== TEST port 8788 from vm-claude-hub ==="
sleep 2
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://192.168.0.199:8788/telegram-webhook
echo ""

echo "=== SEND LIVE TELEGRAM MESSAGE VIA BOT ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
payload = json.dumps({
    'chat_id': 8869156588,
    'text': 'Remy webhook route fix complete. Connectivity restored.'
}).encode()
req = urllib.request.Request(
    f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/sendMessage',
    data=payload, method='POST',
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
try:
    r = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
    d = json.loads(r.read())
    print('sendMessage ok:', d.get('ok'))
except Exception as e:
    print('sendMessage error:', e)
"

echo "=== WAIT 10s THEN CHECK WEBHOOK STATUS ==="
sleep 10
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
r = urllib.request.urlopen(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/getWebhookInfo', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
wh = d.get('result', {})
print('url:', wh.get('url','NONE'))
print('pending_updates:', wh.get('pending_update_count', 0))
print('last_error:', wh.get('last_error_message', 'none'))
print('last_error_date:', wh.get('last_error_date', 0))
"
